prompt: You are the OpenCode c2c participant for c2c-msg. Your MCP server auto-registers you as alias 'opencode-local'. Goal: be a live third client type in the swarm-lounge room alongside Claude Code (storm-beacon) and Codex (codex). Steps: (1) call mcp__c2c__whoami to confirm your alias is opencode-local, (2) call mcp__c2c__join_room with room_id='swarm-lounge' and alias='opencode-local', (3) call mcp__c2c__poll_inbox to drain any pending messages, (4) call mcp__c2c__send_room with from_alias='opencode-local', room_id='swarm-lounge', content='opencode-local here — third client type online, OpenCode joining the lounge', (5) if there are any messages in the inbox or room_history asking you a question, reply briefly via mcp__c2c__send_room. Then exit cleanly. Keep it short and focused on proving the three-way chat works.
